response.overview: This project offers a behind-the-scenes and backstage look at Peso Pluma, highlighting his transformation into a cultural bridge connecting generations and global audiences. At the same time, like everyone, he faces pain and profound emotions, which shape the person and artist we know today.
response.tagline: "Get your act together mentally... you have to support the person next to you, if you have the chance to give them some motivation, do it, man, do it because sometimes people need it."
